Consider giving Faint & Leigh a Burial Grounds, Thais ideally wants Life Drain but Re - Evolution is a solid alternative for her and for Sorel she ideally wants a Chamber, Paradox, or April Tribute but Crimson Pulse is a decent filer option
And if this is Arc 1, you'll ideally want to be running Brown WoD as they are very overpowered at this point of time
Thanks I'll try some stuff out

BiS 

Frenzy - Adds Cursed Relics to the ingame Shops, purchasing a Cursed Relic refunds 15 Black Sigils

Emerge - Can refund the shop (up to 3 times), each at 0 cost

Gluttony - Reject offers to place Orisons on your Cards to gain a boost in your Max Health (up to 2 times)

Contenders 

Aged - Grants 1000 Keyflare after completing a Battle

Whisper - Grants 50 Aliemus to the Ally with the least Aliemus after completing a Battle

Epiphany - Grants 1000 Keyflare at the beginning of a Stage, grants 2 Arithmatecia for the first turn of a Boss Battle

Situational

Hope - Recover 5% of loss Health upon discovering a new Tile. After using an Emergency Gnosis, receive 100% Crit Damage + Chance

Vitality - Receive the additional Option to remove up to 3 Symptoms / States in Junctions

The Sig WoD that you have for Sorel works just fine, but for the SR WoD you'd likely want to consider picking up an Analysis of Death as it will provide for her Crit Rate + Damage Stats that she wants
That aside, your Comps + Enlightenments are solids
Just need to adjust your Covenants & WoD and you should be good to go
And for the next time something like this happens, consider moving onto <#1400749543288475770> where people can better help you with your Comps
Understood thank you for all the help, I'm still pretty new to the game, at 4-10 right now
Yh np man and hf, goodluck on your upcoming story Stages too as from that point on from where you're currently at it will consistently become more difficult
Cool cool, consider using Thais Exalt to Dupe Sorel's 2-Cost Skill too
Because your Thais is E2, she will Dupe the selected Card within your Hand twice and reduce its Cost by 2
Also because of how Sorel's Exalt works, the Infinite Devour modifier will allow you to recast it within the same breadth if you have multiple Embryos within your Hand
That's what I was using thais rouse for, since it acts as 2 embryos if there are none left

content: any of you lot know about Neo Artifacts
Upcoming SRPG I'm contractually obligated to keep an eye on
it's got a global test up later this week and I guess folk here who play Morimens in Chinese might be aware if it has any issues etc
Hi, does the Limbus Company fandom at large have burn out?
Hope work is treating you well
They enter the mirror dungeon mines like the peasants they are
Hi guys, I'm a new player here, I want to ask something.
Until the glorious leader trickles down content for them to read
Is it better to gacha when you first start or wait until you have accumulated more to get a gacha?
it is best to start at the start of a patch/re-run cycle, play for a bit, then have time before the end of that patch/re-run to look into it
gamba = feeling like you gotta stick around

once you decide to stick around a bit and play it for a while:

1. decide how much you're OK spending - nothing is fine
2. make sure you're aware how pity and guarantees work
3. always think in terms of guarantees
so don't engage in the gambling
example: in Morimens, limited characters and their wheels are _guaranteed_ to show up if you spend 90 pulls on them
so if you decide "hmm, this character is worth 90 pulls" and you invest 90 pulls, and you only needed to spend 45, well, that's just a nice bonus
but if you invest 45 and you actually needed 46?
you end up being pressured into spending more than you originally intended
Woaahh, that's a lot of advice
I'm sure you're already very good at playing this game.
no, this is just common advice
general advice of gacha is gamba in whatever way will make you enjoy the game, assuming you're not planning to spend a ton asap
there's no point in hoarding resources if you will end up hating the game and quitting in 3 days due to having nothing to play with, for instance
Beware of redditors calling you a whale and fake clears
redditors have no human rights anyways
they gave it up themselves by shooting each other in the foot
Thats how balkan people talk about the country next door

I am one of them.

At least no gacha for most units if doing a lot of MD grinding
